label: garden_plan
value: With a generous budget, planning to get high-quality seeds and plants for the upcoming planting season.

label: food_preferences
value: Interested in vegetarian recipes using fresh garden produce, specifically tips on keeping vegetables crisp and flavorful when cooking, and suggestions for sides like steamed rice or quinoa, garlic naan, sesame seeds, crushed nuts, pickled vegetables, crusty bread, salad, herb butter, roasted sweet potatoes, grilled corn on the cob, avocado salsa, and quinoa or couscous salad.

label: hobbies_and_projects
value: Inspired to advance knitting skills by creating intricate lace shawls and complex cable-knit sweaters for grandchildren, seeking advice on patterns and techniques, and aware of common mistakes to avoid such as incorrect yarn overs, miscounting stitches, inconsistent tension, ignoring gauge, skipping rows or rounds, using the wrong cable needle, crossing cables incorrectly, not maintaining consistent tension, ignoring the impact of cables on row count, and not blocking properly.

label: book_club_details
value: Considering a historical fiction novel for the next meeting, with recommendations including 'The Book Thief' by Markus Zusak, 'All the Light We Cannot See' by Anthony Doerr, 'The Nightingale' by Kristin Hannah, and 'The Underground Railroad' by Colson Whitehead.

label: retirement_community_interest
value: Considering moving to a retirement community that offers an active social life, with considerations for financial situation.

label: upcoming_events
value: Coordinating a fall festival and a holiday bazaar, seeking advice on managing time effectively for these events

label: genealogical_research_interest
value: Received old family letters and photos from a distant relative and plans to dedicate several hours each day to documenting the family's history. Interested in strategies for organizing and preserving these items.

label: community_involvement
value: Decided to cut back on community commitments but will still attend monthly book club meetings and local genealogy workshops.

label: cooking_preferences
value: Using more pre-prepared ingredients and slow cookers to save time, interested in quick and easy recipes that still taste great.

label: health_and_wellness_preferences
value: Interested in easy ways to incorporate more vegetables into the diet without spending too much time preparing them, including using pre-cut and pre-washed vegetables, roasting, stir-fries, smoothies, soups, snacks, wraps, one-pot meals, frozen vegetables, and meal prep.

label: genealogical_research_tools
value: Recommended tools for managing and sharing digital files include Google Drive, Dropbox, Microsoft OneDrive for cloud storage; RootsMagic, Ancestry Desktop, Family Tree Maker for genealogy; Adobe Lightroom, Picasa, Daminion for photo management; Trove, FileMaker Pro for file management; Ancestry, MyHeritage, FamilySearch for sharing and collaboration; Facebook Groups, Tabletopia for social media and community platforms.
